narrative:
Southington Twp Only township has 2,371 registered voters, with 56.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.6%, a narrow Republican lean of 0.7 percentage points.
